GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [w_warehouse_name@0 ASC]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[w_warehouse_name, w_warehouse_sq_ft, w_city, w_county, w_state, w_country, ship_carriers, year_], aggr=[sum(x.jan_sales), sum(x.feb_sales), sum(x.mar_sales), sum(x.apr_sales), sum(x.may_sales), sum(x.jun_sales), sum(x.jul_sales), sum(x.aug_sales), sum(x.sep_sales), sum(x.oct_sales), sum(x.nov_sales), sum(x.dec_sales), sum(x.jan_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.feb_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.mar_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.apr_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.may_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.jun_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.jul_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.aug_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.sep_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.oct_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.nov_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.dec_sales / x.w_warehouse_sq_ft), sum(x.jan_net), sum(x.feb_net), sum(x.mar_net), sum(x.apr_net), sum(x.may_net), sum(x.jun_net), sum(x.jul_net), sum(x.aug_net), sum(x.sep_net), sum(x.oct_net), sum(x.nov_net), sum(x.dec_net)]

          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([w_warehouse_name@0, w_warehouse_sq_ft@1, w_city@2, w_county@3, w_state@4, w_country@5, ship_carriers@6, year_@7], 8), input_partitions=8

                    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[w_warehouse_name, w_warehouse_sq_ft, w_city, w_county, w_state, w_country, d_year], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_moy = Int64(1) THEN GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=776, subtree_max_row_bytes=1552
  GpuSortExec: row_width=776, subtree_max_row_bytes=1552
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=776, subtree_max_row_bytes=1552
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=776, subtree_max_row_bytes=1552
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=776, subtree_max_row_bytes=1376
          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=776, subtree_max_row_bytes=1376
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=776, subtree_max_row_bytes=1376
              GpuProjectExec: row_width=600, subtree_max_row_bytes=1184
                InterleaveExec: row_width=584, subtree_max_row_bytes=1140
                  GpuProjectExec: row_width=584, subtree_max_row_bytes=1140
                    GpuAggregateExec: row_width=552, subtree_max_row_bytes=1140
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=552, subtree_max_row_bytes=1140
                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=552, subtree_max_row_bytes=1140
                          GpuAggregateExec: row_width=552, subtree_max_row_bytes=1140
                            GpuProjectExec: row_width=588, subtree_max_row_bytes=796
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=208, subtree_max_row_bytes=440
